name: python
install_hint: Install Python 3.11+ and enable PATH integration.

name: nodejs
install_hint: Install Node.js LTS for the web console.

name: npm
install_hint: npm is installed with Node.js LTS.

name: postgresql
install_hint: Install PostgreSQL locally on M0 and configure DATABASE_URL outside Git.
manual_install_note: Database initialization and credentials must be handled manually.

name: redis
install_hint: Install Redis or provide a documented fallback for local development.
manual_install_note: Use a Windows-compatible Redis distribution or container according to site policy.

name: openssh_server
install_hint: Enable Windows OpenSSH Server on worker machines.
manual_install_note: Configure LAN-only firewall access from M0.

name: nvidia_driver
install_hint: Install the NVIDIA driver appropriate for the GPU.

name: obs
install_hint: Install OBS Studio for PC game capture.
manual_install_note: Scene, source, and account-specific settings remain manual.

name: ffmpeg
install_hint: Install FFmpeg and ensure it is on PATH.

name: playwright
install_hint: Install the Python Playwright package and browsers according to project policy.

name: browser_chromium_or_edge
install_hint: Use Microsoft Edge or a managed Chromium installation.

name: pywinauto
install_hint: Install pywinauto in the worker Python environment.

name: mss
install_hint: Install mss in the worker Python environment.

name: dxcam
install_hint: Install dxcam in the worker Python environment.

name: android_emulator
install_hint: Install Android Studio Emulator or a managed emulator runtime.
manual_install_note: AVD images and hardware acceleration are manual site setup.

name: autohotkey
install_hint: Optional automation helper for controlled local workflows.
